narrative:
Wilson (precinct in Clinton County) has 335 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 45.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 37.3 percentage points.
